Operational Incident Report — Oaktide Logistics Limited (Australia) — 21 May 2026
Entity reference: ACN 000 000 000 (placeholder); registered office: Level 8, 77 Latham St, Dockham NSW 2000
Incident ID: OT-OPS-2026-0518; Business Unit: Distribution (NSW)
Summary: On 18 May 2026 a third-party warehouse management SaaS outage at QuarryCloud Pty Ltd caused delayed dispatch; no unauthorised access detected.
ASX/ASIC context: Continuous disclosure (Corporations Act s 674; ASX Listing Rule 3.1) reviewed; current view is non-material, operational only.
Public status: A general service-restoration update was posted 19 May 2026 on the ASX platform and company website; information therein is already public and no selective disclosure has been made.
Blackout/insider references: Staff trading window remains per Securities Dealing Policy; this note does not alter s 1043A insider trading obligations.
Other filings for context: ASIC Form 361 (12 Feb 2025) and Appendix 4D HY25 were previously lodged and unrelated to this incident.
Impact: Four NSW sites paused outbound scans, used manual manifests; no cancellations, some deliveries deferred less than one day.
Data/privacy: No TFNs, Medicare numbers, credit card PANs, or health information were processed by the affected service.
PII note: One staff access log contained internal employee identifier ST-04421 linked to a roster entry; retained for audit, purge scheduled per policy.
Communications: Vendor ticket QC-INC-8821 opened via support@quarrycloud.au; customer enquiries redirected to 1300-000-000 (public helpdesk).
MNPI caution: Preliminary internal forecast suggests short-term throughput may be below prior operational guidance pending remediation; Disclosure Committee to reassess materiality before any ASX update.
Public references: Company media statement dated 19/05/26 and ASX announcement “Operations Update — NSW Weather” (03/04/26) cited for background only.
Next steps: Vendor RCA due within five business days; internal lessons-learned registered with Risk & Compliance; updates via intranet service bulletin.
